Oskar Ernst Bernhardt

Abd-ru-shin

1875 – 1941  ·  Servant of the Light

The Grail Message · Vol. I

The Author

Abd-ru-shin — Servant of the Light

✦

Oskar Ernst Bernhardt, who wrote under the spiritual name Abd-ru-shin — meaning "Servant of the Light" — was born on April 18, 1875, in Bischofswerda, a small Saxon town near Dresden, Germany. He grew up in a warm household, received a commercial education, and later became a successful merchant and author of travelogues, novels and plays — several performed in Leipzig.

When World War I broke out he was living in London, and was interned by the British Government on the Isle of Man as a German national from 1914 to 1919. It was during this period of forced silence and inward reflection that his great spiritual insights began to crystallise.

Returning to Germany in 1919, he began delivering and writing the lectures that would become In the Light of Truth — The Grail Message, first published in 1926. In 1928 he settled on Vomperberg in the Tyrol, Austria, where a community of readers gathered around him.

In 1938, when the Nazis seized Austria, Abd-ru-shin was arrested, his work banned and his property confiscated. Kept under Gestapo house arrest, he continued revising his work in exile. He passed on December 6, 1941. Yet his Word endures — translated into dozens of languages and read by earnest seekers across the world.

1875

Born in Bischofswerda, Saxony, Germany

1907

Leaves commerce; becomes a full-time writer

1914–1919

Interned on the Isle of Man; spiritual insights crystallise

1923

Begins publishing the Grail Papers (Gralsblätter)

1926

First edition of The Grail Message published

1931

Expanded edition of 168 lectures completed

1938–1941

Arrested by Nazis; passes away December 6, Kipsdorf

"I do not hand over the Message so that you can deal with It as you see fit — I COMMAND that It must remain immutable in all that It contains. It is the Holy Word of God, which man may not touch." — Abd-ru-shin
The Works

Books by Abd-ru-shin

✦
Core Work1926 / Final 1937

In the Light of Truth – The Grail Message, Vol. I

The foundational volume. Addresses the origin of the human spirit, the Laws of Creation, the nature of God, man's journey through existence, free will, karma, and the path of ascent. Over one million copies printed worldwide.

KSH 2,500
Core Work1931 Edition

In the Light of Truth – The Grail Message, Vol. II

Deepens understanding of the ethereal world, nature beings, the beyond, and what truly awaits the human soul after physical death. Reveals the immutable Laws of Creation at work throughout existence.

KSH 2,500
Core WorkFinal Edition

In the Light of Truth – The Grail Message, Vol. III

The concluding volume. Covers humanity's responsibilities in Creation, the Holy Grail, the relationship between man and woman, the cosmic turning point, and the full 168-lecture panorama of Creation.

KSH 2,500
Best ValueComplete Set

The Grail Message – Complete 3-Volume Boxed Set

All 168 lectures in one beautiful authorised boxed set. The definitive collection for every sincere seeker — save KSH 1,000 compared to buying volumes individually.

KSH 6,500
Sacred CommentaryAbd-ru-shin

The Ten Commandments of God & The Lord's Prayer

Abd-ru-shin illuminates the Ten Commandments and the Lord's Prayer not as religious formula but as living cosmic laws. Each commandment is explained as an immutable pillar of Creation — the Lord's Prayer revealed word by word as a perfect spiritual petition.

KSH 1,800
DevotionalAbd-ru-shin

Prayers — Given to Mankind by Abd-ru-shin

A treasury of prayers composed personally by Abd-ru-shin — not drawn from tradition but given as living words of power aligned with the Laws of Creation. When spoken with inner sincerity, these prayers set real threads of fate into motion.

KSH 1,500
ReferenceAbd-ru-shin

Questions and Answers

Questions put directly to Abd-ru-shin by earnest readers, answered by him personally. Topics include reincarnation, nature beings, prayer, illness, fate, animals in Creation, and the difference between the human spirit and the animal soul.

KSH 2,000
IntroductoryAbd-ru-shin

Selected Lectures from "In the Light of Truth"

An ideal entry point for the new seeker. Curated lectures covering the origin of the human spirit, the Laws of Creation, karma, life after death, and the meaning of human existence. The PDF version is available free below.

KSH 1,800
Reflective StudyAbd-ru-shin

Thoughts on the Work "In the Light of Truth"

A deeply personal and contemplative work by Abd-ru-shin — entirely distinct from the Resonances volumes. He shares earnest inner reflections on the content and spirit of the Grail Message, guiding the reader on how to truly absorb and live out its teachings.

KSH 1,900
Scholarly LecturesDr. Kurt Illig

Lectures in the Proximity of Abd-ru-shin

Compiled by Dr. Kurt Illig in close collaboration with Abd-ru-shin. Covers: the God-teachings and main science · the law of reciprocal action · origin and effect of love · gravitational force in spiritual life · origin of gross matter.

KSH 2,000

Core Themes

What the Grail Message Reveals

✦

Written between 1923 and 1938, the 168 essays of the Grail Message address every sphere of human existence — from the origin of the spirit to the laws governing all of Creation.

🌌

The Laws of Creation

Immutable, living laws woven into Creation by the Creator — including the Law of Reciprocal Action, the Law of Attraction of Homogeneous Species, and the Law of Gravity of the Spirit. Understanding these laws is essential for navigating life consciously.

✨

The Human Spirit

Human beings are spiritual guests on this earth, descended from a higher spiritual realm. Life on earth is a school for the spirit's development and ascent back toward the Light of God. The spirit is immortal; only the body is temporary.

⚖️

Karma & Reciprocal Action

Every thought, word and deed carries threads of fate that return to the sender multiplied. The Grail Message explains karma not as punishment but as the perfect, loving justice of a living Creation.

🕊️

The Mission of Jesus

Abd-ru-shin provides a clarifying exposition of the true Mission of Jesus — not misunderstood redemption by proxy, but the living example of the Love of God and the path of ascent available to all human spirits.

🌅

Life After Death

What truly happens when the physical body dies? The Grail Message describes the ethereal world, the planes of the beyond, and the continued journey of the human spirit with remarkable clarity.

⚜️

The Holy Grail

The Holy Grail is described not as an earthly myth but as a spiritual reality — the highest connecting point between the Creator and all of Creation, a living, luminous vessel of Divine power.

🧠

Intellect vs. Intuition

Over-reliance on the intellect has choked humanity's spiritual perception. The true instrument of the spirit is intuition — the direct voice of the inner self, which alone connects man to the living Creation.

🌿

Free Will & Responsibility

Every human spirit is given free will. This gift carries absolute personal responsibility — no one can be saved by another. Each person must strive, seek, and act according to the Laws of Creation.
